features: STREAK FREE GLASS CLEANING: Achieve a flawless, streak-free shine on windows, mirrors, and glass surfaces. This powerful window cleaner eliminates smudges, fingerprints, and dust, leaving nothing behind but a crystal-clear finish. Perfect for household essentials, from shower glass to glass tables.
FRESH SPRING BLOSSOM SCENT: Cleaning doesn't just have to be about sparkle—it can smell amazing too! The refreshing Spring Blossom scent adds a light, floral fragrance to every room.

FAST ACTING DIRT REMOVAL: Tough on grease yet gentle on glass, this high-performance formula cuts through grime effortlessly. Ideal for kitchen windows and stove glass cleaning, it restores clarity in seconds without the need for excessive scrubbing.

EASY TO USE SPRAY BOTTLE: Designed for convenience, the 500ml spray bottle provides effortless application. Simply spray, wipe, and admire the results! A must-have for any window cleaning equipment collection, making the job quicker and easier.

VERSATILE FOR MULTIPLE SURFACES: More than just a glass cleaner, this formula is perfect for windows, mirrors, glass tables, and even shower screens. Keep every reflective surface in your home spotless and shining with minimal effort.
IDEAL FOR HOME & OFFICE USE: Not just for home cleaning, this glass cleaner is perfect for office windows and mirrors too. Keep workspaces bright and fresh with spotless glass surfaces that impress.

NO HARSH SCRUBBING REQUIRED: The powerful formula does the hard work, so there’s no need for intense scrubbing. Just spray and wipe for a deep clean that saves time and effort while delivering a gleaming finish.

WINDOW CLEANING KIT ESSENTIAL: Whether using it alone or with a window vacuum, this spray ensures professional-level results. Use alongside other cleaning supplies for a complete deep clean that makes every glass surface gleam.

PERFECT FOR BATHROOMS & KITCHENS: Use it as a shower glass cleaner to remove watermarks and soap scum or keep kitchen glass surfaces free from cooking splatters. It’s a household essential that makes everyday cleaning effortless.

A MUST HAVE IN CLEANING SUPPLIES: An essential addition to any household cleaning kit, this Elbow Grease spray ensures windows, glass doors, and mirrors remain sparkling clean. A simple way to achieve a professional-level clean with every use.
description: Product Description Give windows, mirrors, and glass surfaces a brilliant, streak-free finish with Elbow Grease Pink Glass Cleaner. Designed for a powerful deep clean, this 500ml spray bottle cuts through grease, grime, and fingerprints with ease. The streak-free formula ensures a crystal-clear shine, making it an essential addition to any window cleaning kit. Infused with a delightful Spring Blossom fragrance, it leaves every cleaned surface smelling fresh and inviting. Whether tackling household essentials like shower glass or using it as a stove glass cleaner, this high-performance spray guarantees dazzling results. Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: Parfum Directions * Turn the spray nozzle to the 'ON' position * Spray directly onto the surface from a distance of 20cm and wipe with a paper towel or clean cloth * Return spray nozzle to 'OFF' position * For heavily soiled surfaces repeat application See more
